_comment: Manual corrections applied AFTER the API fetch (override always wins and persists across fetches). Use when football-data.org reports a wrong score, or to show a just-finished match before the feed flips it to FINISHED. group format: {"<mid>": [home, away]}. ko format: {"<mid>": [homeES, awayES, homeGoals, awayGoals, advancingTeamES]}. Entries auto-remove once the API reports that match FINISHED with a matching score. Current: mid 68 = Croacia 2-1 Ghana (shown early while API still IN_PLAY).
